name: Girls und Panzer T-34
description:
It's pretty much T-34 but with GuP characters

On the Soviet side you have: Katyusha, Nonna and Klara

And on the German side: Maho Nishizumi, Erika Itsumi and Koume

You can decide your own role. Be it German or Russian. You can even be the loader for the main cast since that spot is vacant

There are three scenarios in the bot:

1.Katyusha and her T-34 crew before they're captured. So you can pretty much play it your way. Either loosing and getting captured or winning

2.Katyusha and her crew have been captured and the live training is about to start. Again it's up to you to choose how it plays out

3.And in this scenario it's the finale. Katyusha and her crew escaped the training grounds and are in the nearby city. And they're being hunted by Maho and the rest

All the characters are over the age of 18
creator: Tanksforfun
